signals.headline: Trump Signals Iran War 'Very Close to Over' with New Talks and Ceasefire Extension Agreement | YES | HIGH confidence** [
signals.raw:
Trump Signals Iran War 'Very Close to Over' with New Talks and Ceasefire Extension Agreement | YES | HIGH confidence** [2][3]

US President Donald Trump stated on April 15, 2026, that the Iran war is "very close to over," citing an "in principle agreement" between Washington and Tehran to extend the current ceasefire beyond April 22 for further negotiations, potentially in Islamabad within days.[2

signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair Amid Rising US Inflation and South Korea Trade Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Fed Chair Amid Rising US Inflation and South Korea Trade Tensions | YES | HIGH confidence**

Kevin Warsh was just-announced by President Trump as nominee to replace Jerome Powell as Fed Chair in May 2026, sparking market uncertainty over his hawkish stance on inflation amid accelerating wholesale prices (PPI up 3% annually in Dec 2025, core 3.5%) and PCE at 3%.[1][2]
matched_markets: Kevin Warsh confirmed as Fed Chair by May 15?
Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Putin Announces Limited Easter Ceasefire in Ukraine (April 11-12) | NO | LOW confidence** [1]
signals.raw:
Putin Announces Limited Easter Ceasefire in Ukraine (April 11-12) | NO | LOW confidence** [1]

Russian President Vladimir Putin declared a one-off Easter ceasefire in Ukraine from 4:00 p.m. Moscow time April 11 to midnight April 12, halting combat but maintaining readiness; experts deem it humanitarian but unlikely to advance talks.[1] No connection to Iran or broader Russia-Ukraine resolution; Uk
